requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and MS IEC 61000-Series for PV Inverters — Malaysia ST / SIRIM Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和MS IEC 61000系列——马来西亚ST / SIRIM要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和MS IEC 61000系列——馬來西亞ST / SIRIM要求

summary.en: Malaysia adopts IEC standards as Malaysian Standards (MS) through the Department of Standards Malaysia (DSM). For PV inverters, the applicable EMC standards are IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and the MS IEC 61000-series, including MS IEC 61000-3-2 (Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase). EMC compliance is relevant both as part of the SIRIM QAS International conformity assessment for the ST Certificate of Approval (CoA) and as a component of TNB's grid-connection technical review. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment and is the appropriate standard for PV inverters in the Malaysian context. Confirm with SIRIM QAS International and ST which specific EMC standards are cited in the current regulated electrical equipment list and CoA assessment scope for PV inverters, as the ST regulated product list and associated technical requirements are subject to update.
summary.zh: 马来西亚通过马来西亚标准局（DSM）将IEC标准采纳为马来西亚标准（MS）。光伏逆变器适用的EMC标准包括IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）及MS IEC 61000系列，包括MS IEC 61000-3-2（每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备谐波电流排放限值）。EMC合规作为SIRIM QAS International合格评定（用于ST批准证书/CoA）的组成部分，同时也是TNB并网技术审查的一个要素。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，在马来西亚背景下适用于光伏逆变器。请向SIRIM QAS International和ST确认当前受管制电气设备清单和光伏逆变器CoA评估范围中所引用的具体EMC标准，因ST受管制产品清单及相关技术要求可能更新。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞通過馬來西亞標準局（DSM）將IEC標準採納為馬來西亞標準（MS）。光伏逆變器適用的EMC標準包括IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）及MS IEC 61000系列，包括MS IEC 61000-3-2（每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備諧波電流排放限值）。EMC合規作為SIRIM QAS International合格評定（用於ST批准證書/CoA）的組成部分，同時也是TNB併網技術審查的一個要素。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，在馬來西亞背景下適用於光伏逆變器。請向SIRIM QAS International和ST確認當前受管制電氣設備清單和光伏逆變器CoA評估範圍中所引用的具體EMC標準，因ST受管制產品清單及相關技術要求可能更新。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (applicable to PV inverters in Malaysia via MS adoption pathway)
MS IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (Malaysian Standard adopting IEC 61000-3-2)
Electrical Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) — Malaysia, basis for ST Certificate of Approval requirements
SIRIM QAS International — conformity assessment body for ST Certificate of Approval for regulated electrical equipment in Malaysia

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods also referenced in Chinese domestic standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and MS IEC 61000-3-2 as applied in Malaysia. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted by SIRIM QAS International as IEC 62920 or MS IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Malaysian ST CoA assessment.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准中也引用的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与马来西亚适用的IEC 62920和MS IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅基于GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被SIRIM QAS International接受为马来西亚ST CoA评估的IEC 62920或MS IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準中也引用的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與馬來西亞適用的IEC 62920和MS IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅基於GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被SIRIM QAS International接受為馬來西亞ST CoA評估的IEC 62920或MS IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy SIRIM QAS International's IEC 62920 and MS IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Malaysian ST CoA assessment, nor does it satisfy TNB's grid-connection EMC evidence requirements. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) MS IEC 61000-3-2 (IEC 61000-3-2) harmonic current emission test report for the model. These reports should be specific to the power rating and configuration of the inverter supplied to Malaysia. Where harmonic test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V), consider whether retesting under Malaysia grid conditions (240/415 V, 50 Hz) is required by SIRIM QAS International or the TNB project engineer. Confirm the current SIRIM QAS CoA assessment scope and EMC test evidence requirements directly with SIRIM QAS International at sirimqas.com.my before planning the test programme.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足SIRIM QAS International对马来西亚ST CoA评估的IEC 62920和MS IEC 61000-3-2要求，也不满足TNB并网EMC证据要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的MS IEC 61000-3-2（IEC 61000-3-2）谐波电流排放测试报告。上述报告应针对供应至马来西亚的逆变器功率等级和配置。若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V）下获取，应与SIRIM QAS International或TNB项目工程师确认是否需要在马来西亚电网条件（240/415 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。在规划测试计划前，请直接向sirimqas.com.my的SIRIM QAS International确认当前SIRIM QAS CoA评估范围和EMC测试证据要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足SIRIM QAS International對馬來西亞ST CoA評估的IEC 62920和MS IEC 61000-3-2要求，也不滿足TNB併網EMC證據要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的MS IEC 61000-3-2（IEC 61000-3-2）諧波電流排放測試報告。上述報告應針對供應至馬來西亞的逆變器功率等級和配置。若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V）下取得，應與SIRIM QAS International或TNB項目工程師確認是否需要在馬來西亞電網條件（240/415 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。在規劃測試計畫前，請直接向sirimqas.com.my的SIRIM QAS International確認當前SIRIM QAS CoA評估範圍和EMC測試證據要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as part of SIRIM QAS International conformity assessment for ST Certificate of Approval under Electrical Supply Act 1990; mandatory in practice for TNB grid-connection technical review
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy SIRIM QAS International's IEC 62920 and MS IEC 61000-3-2 requirements for Malaysian ST CoA assessment. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before applying to SIRIM QAS International for CoA assessment. Confirm whether Malaysia grid voltage conditions (240/415 V, 50 Hz) require retesting compared to test results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions. Verify current SIRIM QAS CoA scope and EMC requirements directly at sirimqas.com.my and st.gov.my.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足SIRIM QAS International对马来西亚ST CoA评估的IEC 62920和MS IEC 61000-3-2要求。在向SIRIM QAS International申请CoA评估前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认马来西亚电网电压条件（240/415 V、50 Hz）是否需要相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下的测试结果重新测试。请直接在sirimqas.com.my和st.gov.my核实SIRIM QAS CoA范围和EMC要求的现行版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足SIRIM QAS International對馬來西亞ST CoA評估的IEC 62920和MS IEC 61000-3-2要求。在向SIRIM QAS International申請CoA評估前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認馬來西亞電網電壓條件（240/415 V、50 Hz）是否需要相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下的測試結果重新測試。請直接在sirimqas.com.my和st.gov.my核實SIRIM QAS CoA範圍和EMC要求的現行版本。
